name: kt-skills
description: Pattern-enforcement skills for kt-monorepo projects: project bootstrap, page/section/component scaffolding, and design-token migrations following the page-builder convention.

metadata.compatibility: Compatible with npx skills and Claude plugin manifest discovery

plugins.name: kt
plugins.description: Skills that bootstrap and extend kt-monorepo projects per the page-builder pattern (Next.js 16 + Sanity v5 + Tailwind 4 + shadcn/ui)

dependencies.note: kt-skills assumes the canonical stack. Companion repositories are listed for context.

repositories.name: eljun/workflow-skills
repositories.description: Development workflow chain: task -> implement -> simplify -> test -> document -> ship -> release
